market.question: Will the Federal Reserve cut interest rates at the March 2024 FOMC meeting?
market.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the FOMC announces a rate cut of any size at the March 19-20, 2024 meeting.

articles.title: US CPI rises 0.4% in February, higher than expected
articles.summary: Consumer prices rose 0.4% in February, above economist forecasts of 0.3%, reducing expectations for early Federal Reserve rate cuts.

articles.title: Powell signals no rush to cut rates amid sticky inflation
articles.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell told Congress the central bank is not ready to cut rates and needs more data showing inflation is sustainably moving toward the 2% target.

microstructure.notes: VPIN above threshold indicates informed traders; negative OFI confirms NO pressure

wikipedia_velocity.interpretation: Edit spike suggests breaking news — amplifies directional signals from other sources

sub_claims.claim: CPI will be below 3.0% by March 2024 FOMC meeting
sub_claims.reasoning: February CPI came in at 3.2%; services inflation remains sticky.

sub_claims.claim: Labor market will show significant weakening before March FOMC
sub_claims.reasoning: Unemployment at 3.9%, near historical lows. No meaningful deterioration visible.

sub_claims.claim: Powell will signal readiness to cut in pre-meeting communications
sub_claims.reasoning: Powell's Congressional testimony explicitly stated the Fed is 'not quite there yet'.

llm_decomposition.outside_view_reasoning: Fed cuts at ~25% of FOMC meetings in non-crisis periods; current inflation environment is atypical.

signals.notes: 2 articles: Feb CPI surprise + Powell hawkish Congressional testimony
VPIN=0.52, OFI=-0.38 — informed traders buying NO
Kalshi=0.12, Metaculus=0.10, Manifold=0.15 — all more bearish than Polymarket
4.2x edit velocity spike on Federal_Reserve page — amplifier signal

edge.interpretation: Model says P(YES)=3.9%, market says 18.0%. Edge of 14.1% favors buying NO.

trade_decision.rationale: All 4 directional signals point NO. Posterior (3.9%) is 14.1pp below market price (18%). Edge clears 3% threshold. Kelly sizing confirms positive EV.

outcome.notes: Fed held rates at March 19-20, 2024 FOMC meeting. NO position expired at $1.00. Trade was profitable.
